howItWorks.title: Get started in just a few minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No technical skills needed. No complex setup.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up for free and log in right in your browser. No credit card required.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add staff, services and configure pay % the way you already run your business.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Share your booking link with customers and track revenue in real time.
howItWorks.closingLine: Most salons can set up and use the full system within 30 minutes.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions.
faq.heroTitle: All your questions answered before you start
faq.heroSubtext: Find answers quickly or contact our support team.
faq.q1: Do I need anything complicated to get started?
faq.a1: Nope. Just sign up and you can use it straight away in your browser. If you want the Desktop app, installation is quick too.
faq.q2: Can I use it on my phone?
faq.a2: Yes. You can check appointments and revenue on your phone anytime, even when you're not at the salon.
faq.q3: I'm not tech-savvy. Can I still use it?
faq.a3: Yes. SalonGo is made for salon owners, not IT people. If you need help getting started, our team will support you.
faq.a4: Yes. Data is stored and backed up regularly. Customer and revenue information is always protected.
faq.q5: Am I locked into a contract?
faq.a5: No. You can upgrade, downgrade or stop anytime. No hidden fees.
faq.a6: Yes. The system automatically splits percentages and sums up pay clearly each month. No more manual calculations.
faq.q7: Is SalonGo for small or large salons?
faq.a7: Both. You can start small and upgrade as your salon grows.
faq.q8: Can I try before I decide?
faq.a8: Yes. You can try for free before committing.
faq.a9: We reply within 24 hours and support in Vietnamese. You won't be left on your own.
faq.closingParagraph: Still unsure? The best way is to try it and see for yourself before deciding.
faq.noResults: No questions match. Try different keywords or contact support.

about.title: About SalonGo
about.missionDesc: Help Vietnamese salons in Europe manage more easily.
about.why1: We saw many salons managing by hand with scattered paperwork.
about.why2: Complex payroll calculations, errors and disputes between owners and staff.
about.why3: Double bookings, lost customers, hard to track revenue when away.
about.roadmap1: Smarter booking: multi-channel reminders, SMS integration.
about.roadmap2: Advanced reports: detailed charts, export for accounting.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Send us a message – we'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.heroSubtext: The SalonGo team responds within 24 hours – with full Vietnamese support.
contact.successMessage: Thank you! We will respond within 24 hours.
contact.successSubtext: We will get in touch via the email you provided.
contact.quickSupportDesc: Email us directly, chat or book a demo.
contact.faqQ1: How soon will I get a response?
contact.faqA1: We aim to respond within 24 business hours. We prioritise email and the contact form.
contact.faqA2: Yes. Our support team and interface are available in Vietnamese.
contact.faqA3: Yes. We provide free setup guidance via email and docs. Premium plans get priority support.
contact.ctaTitle: Start managing your salon professionally today

pricingPage.heroTitle: Choose the plan that fits your salon size
pricingPage.heroSubtext: No hidden fees. Cancel anytime. Full Vietnamese support.
pricingPage.faqQ1: Do I need a long-term contract?
pricingPage.faqA1: No. You can pay monthly and cancel anytime.
pricingPage.faqA2: No customer limit. Only staff limit depends on the plan.
pricingPage.faqQ3: Can I use it on my phone?
pricingPage.faqA3: Yes. Log in via browser on phone or use the desktop app.
pricingPage.faqQ4: Can I export reports to Excel?
pricingPage.faqA4: Yes. Plans from Pro onwards support data export for accounting.
pricingPage.faqA5: The Enterprise plan supports managing multiple locations in one account.
pricingPage.faqA6: Yes. Data is backed up regularly and stored securely in the cloud.
pricingPage.faqA7: Yes. We provide email and documentation support. Premium and above get priority support.
pricingPage.faqA8: Yes. You can change your plan anytime; billing is prorated.
pricingPage.ctaTitle: Start managing your salon professionally today

pages.termsDesc: SalonGo Terms of Service – rules and commitments when using the platform.

privacyPolicy.intro: SalonGo is committed to protecting the privacy of users when using our website and software.
privacyPolicy.serviceDescription: SalonGo is a software platform that helps salons manage business activities such as appointments, services, and staff.
privacyPolicy.userData: SalonGo only stores the information necessary to operate user accounts such as registration email and login credentials.
privacyPolicy.responsibility: SalonGo only provides software tools. Users are responsible for the data they enter into the system.
privacyPolicy.security: We apply reasonable technical measures to protect data and maintain system security.
privacyPolicy.changes: This policy may be updated from time to time. The latest version will always be published on the website.
privacyPolicy.contact: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact:

termsOfService.intro: By accessing or using the SalonGo website and software, you agree to comply with the following Terms of Service.
termsOfService.serviceDescription: SalonGo is a software platform that helps salons manage business activities such as appointments, services, and staff.
termsOfService.accounts: Users are responsible for providing accurate information when creating an account and for keeping their login credentials secure.
termsOfService.usage: Users may not use the service for illegal purposes, interfere with the system, or disrupt the operation of the service.
termsOfService.userData: Users are responsible for the data they enter into the system. SalonGo only provides software tools.
termsOfService.payments: Some features of the service may require payment according to the pricing listed on the website.
termsOfService.limitation: SalonGo is not liable for indirect damages, data loss, or service interruptions beyond reasonable control.
termsOfService.termination: SalonGo may suspend or terminate access to the service if users violate these terms.
termsOfService.law: These terms are governed by the laws of the European Union and the Czech Republic.
termsOfService.contact: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact:

hero.subtitle: SalonGo helps you manage appointments, billing, and track revenue and staff wages in one system – simple and error-free.

download.title: Download Desktop App
download.subtitle: Quick install for Windows or Mac

trust.title: Professional management for Vietnamese salons in Europe
trust.subtext: Built around how Vietnamese salons actually run – simple, clear and fit for doing business in Europe.
trust.point1Desc: Interface and support team fully in Vietnamese. You won't have to figure out a complex system on your own.
trust.point2Desc: Track appointments, revenue and salon activity wherever you are. Always know how the salon is running today.
trust.point3Desc: Automatic % split by service and staff. Fewer mistakes and less end-of-month disagreement.
trust.socialProof: Over 1000+ Vietnamese salons in Europe are already using SalonGo.

problem.title: Common salon challenges
problem.subtitle: Traditional salon management wastes your time and misses opportunities.
problem.item1Title: No dedicated booking page for your salon
problem.item1Desc: Customers have to message or call manually, leading to missed appointments and lost revenue.
problem.item2Desc: Paper and scattered Excel files cause confusion, data loss, and poor control.
problem.item3Title: Too much time spent on staff payroll
problem.item3Desc: Calculating % splits is complex, error-prone, and can cause disputes between owner and staff.
problem.item4Desc: Without a central system, customers often book the same slot – bad for your reputation.
problem.item5Title: Hard to manage the salon when you're away
problem.item5Desc: You can't track appointments and revenue when you're not at the salon.
problem.item6Desc: Missing consolidated reports make it hard for salon owners to assess business performance.

solution.title: SalonGo – Making salon management easier every day
solution.subtitle: A simple, easy-to-use system that helps you manage appointments, staff and revenue clearly and smoothly.
solution.item1Title: SalonGo has a dedicated booking page for your salon
solution.item1Desc: Customers book 24/7 themselves – no more taking bookings manually.
solution.item2Desc: The system updates the calendar automatically and accurately – no forgotten clients or double bookings.
solution.item3Desc: All data – from revenue, appointments and staff to customers – is stored and displayed clearly in one system.
solution.item4Desc: The system automatically calculates and splits pay accurately based on each staff member’s individual revenue.
solution.item5Title: Manage your salon without being there
solution.item5Desc: Check schedule and revenue anytime on your phone or computer.
solution.item6Desc: Reports by day, month and quarter show you how your salon is performing.
solution.result1: No more double bookings, more revenue.
solution.result3: Data in one place, easy to control.

solutionsPage.heroTitle: SalonGo solves real salon problems every day
solutionsPage.heroSubtext: From double bookings and payroll errors to revenue loss – everything can be handled in one system.
solutionsPage.solution1Bullet1: Dedicated booking page for your salon
solutionsPage.resultStat1Desc: Central calendar per staff – online bookings never overlap.
solutionsPage.resultStat2Desc: System auto-calculates % – no more manual end-of-month.
solutionsPage.resultStat3Desc: Know how much your salon is making each day.
solutionsPage.resultStat4Desc: Log in anytime, anywhere – no need to be on-site.
solutionsPage.caseQuote: I used to calculate payroll by hand every end of month. Since using SalonGo, everything is clear and there are no more disputes.
solutionsPage.ctaTitle: Time to manage your salon more professionally
solutionsPage.ctaSubtext: No complex setup. Start using it now.

features.title: Core features
features.subtitle: Everything you need for efficient salon operations – on one platform.
features.item1Desc: Calendar per staff, no time clashes, automatic reminders via SMS or Zalo.
features.item2Desc: Cash, transfer, on account – standard e-invoices, easy tracking.
features.item3Desc: Automatic % split by service and customer, clear monthly pay reports.
features.item4Desc: Revenue by day, month, and staff – clear charts, easy analysis.
features.item5Desc: Staff profiles, % split per service, shift planning – flexibly configurable.
features.item6Desc: Booking link for customers – they choose time, staff and service without calling.

featuresPage.heroTitle: Everything you need to run your salon professionally
featuresPage.heroSubtext: SalonGo helps you manage appointments, staff, revenue and customers in one system – clear and easy to use.
featuresPage.block1Desc: Manage schedules per staff, avoid double bookings, automatic reminders – everything in one screen.
featuresPage.block2Desc: Cash, transfer, on account – standard e-invoices, easy lookup and reporting.
featuresPage.block3Desc: Track revenue by day, month, by staff – clear charts, easy data export.
featuresPage.block4Title: Dedicated online booking page for your salon
featuresPage.block4Desc: Each salon gets its own booking page with a professional link – customers can book 24/7 in a few simple steps.
featuresPage.block4Bullet2: Custom colours & logo to match your brand
featuresPage.block4Bullet3: Book by staff or by service
featuresPage.block5Desc: Each staff member has their own account to log in and track their appointments in real time – no more confusion or depending on the salon owner.
featuresPage.whyTitle: Why do Vietnamese salons need this system?
featuresPage.whyCard1Title: Avoid losing customers to double bookings
featuresPage.whyCard1Desc: Central calendar per staff, online bookings never overlap – salon reputation stays strong.
featuresPage.whyCard2Desc: Transparent % calculation per staff revenue – owners and staff both at ease.
featuresPage.whyCard3Title: Know if your salon is profitable
featuresPage.whyCard3Desc: Revenue reports by day, month, per staff – business decisions based on real data.
featuresPage.testimonialsHeading: Over 1000+ salons use SalonGo every day.
featuresPage.testimonial1Quote: Using SalonGo since opening – no more forgotten appointments or double bookings. Online booking is very convenient.
featuresPage.testimonial2Quote: Automatic payroll, no more disputes with staff. I manage remotely and feel at ease.
featuresPage.testimonial3Quote: Clear reports, I know profit and loss each month. Investing in the right services.
featuresPage.ctaTitle: Ready to run your salon more professionally?
